raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California’s short-term residential therapeutic programs (STRTPs) serve children and young adults who need an increased level of care.",
    "These treatment facilities have the ability to use restraints and seclusion rooms if the facility believes the patient is a danger to themselves or others.",
    "The facilities are required to report all restraint and seclusion room use to the California Department of Social Services (CDSS).",
    "SB 1043 will require CDSS to publicly post critical data, including each incident report related to restraint and seclusion room use.",
    "The Accountability in Children’s Treatment Act addresses the shortfall of the department not publishing data for public access.",
    "The bill aims to promote transparency in the care of children living in California’s short-term residential therapeutic programs (STRTPs)."
  ]
}
```
